overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's neon-lit streets at night, transitioning from an open sidewalk with digital billboards to a covered plaza featuring traditional Japanese-inspired architecture mixed with cyberpunk neon elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk city sidewalk with street vendors and digital billboards

events.description: passing by food stalls on the right side of the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the green-tinted sidewalk past street vendors and digital billboards

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind food stall with colorful umbrella
pedestrian in red outfit walking ahead on the path

entered.detail: Massive curved digital screen displaying animated cartoon character with green hair and red outfit
Black metal railing separating the green sidewalk from the street
Street vendor stalls with colorful umbrellas and displayed goods
Tall futuristic buildings with illuminated windows and neon accents

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a neon-lit cyberpunk sidewalk with a massive digital billboard on the left displaying a cartoon character. Street vendors line the right side under colorful umbrellas, while futuristic skyscrapers tower in the background. The green-tinted pavement reflects the surrounding neon lights as pedestrians move in opposing directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with traditional Japanese roof and red lanterns

events.description: entering covered walkway with traditional Japanese architecture and hanging red lanterns

agents.ego_description: walking into the covered walkway with traditional Japanese roof structure and hanging red lanterns

entered.detail: Traditional Japanese-style wooden roof structure with curved eaves and dark beams
Red and white paper lanterns hanging in rows from the roof structure
Teal-colored neon light strips running along the wooden roof beams

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered walkway featuring traditional Japanese architecture mixed with cyberpunk elements. Red paper lanterns hang from the curved wooden roof, illuminated by teal neon strips. The space feels sheltered compared to the open street, with the traditional roof structure dominating the view ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with traditional hotel architecture and neon signage

events.description: emerging into open plaza with traditional Japanese hotel building visible on the right
turning to the right to observe the hotel entrance and surrounding plaza

agents.ego_description: moving through the plaza and turning to observe the traditional hotel building with neon signage and scattered pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in purple outfit sitting on concrete bench with trash scattered nearby
pedestrian in white shorts and pink leg warmers walking past the camera

entered.detail: Traditional Japanese pagoda-style building with green pillars, wooden beams, and red neon trim
Illuminated sign reading HOTEL with Japanese characters in blue and pink neon
Concrete benches with graffiti and trash scattered on the ground around them
Litter and debris scattered across the green tiled plaza ground

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a plaza featuring a striking traditional Japanese hotel with green pillars and red neon accents. The character turns to observe the hotel entrance while passing concrete benches with scattered trash. A person in purple sits on a bench to the right as another pedestrian in distinctive pink leg warmers walks past.

scene_state.functional_zone: rear plaza area with benches and distant cyberpunk skyscrapers

events.description: continuing through the rear plaza past graffiti-covered benches

agents.ego_description: walking through the rear plaza area, observing the surrounding cyberpunk architecture and distant skyscrapers

entered.detail: Futuristic high-rise buildings with red warning lights on top and illuminated windows
Dark storefronts with neon signs and illuminated entrances

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the rear plaza, passing graffiti-covered concrete benches while the traditional hotel recedes behind. The view opens toward distant cyberpunk skyscrapers with red aviation lights towering against the night sky. The wet pavement continues to reflect the ambient neon glow from surrounding storefronts.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling, neon-lit cyberpunk sidewalk into a sheltered plaza blending traditional Japanese architecture with futuristic elements. It begins by tracking a character past a massive digital billboard and colorful street vendor umbrellas, where green-tinted pavement reflects the towering skyscrapers above. As the character moves forward, the open street shifts into a covered walkway defined by curved wooden roofs, red paper lanterns, and teal neon strips. The scene then opens into a plaza featuring a traditional Japanese hotel with green pillars and red accents, passing concrete benches and eclectic pedestrians before turning toward the rear of the square. Finally, the hotel recedes as the camera pushes deeper into the plaza, revealing graffiti-covered benches and distant skyscrapers with red aviation lights piercing the night sky.
